name: Dal Tadka
chefInspiration: Dhaba-style comfort food — the tadka makes all the difference.
steps: Pressure cook dal with turmeric and salt.
Temper cumin in ghee, add onion and cook.
Add ginger garlic paste, tomatoes, spices.
Mix into dal. Finish with coriander.

name: Chicken Biryani
chefInspiration: Layers of spiced chicken and fragrant basmati — a celebration on a plate.
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices for 1 hr.
Fry onions until golden.
Par-cook rice.
Layer rice and chicken, top with saffron milk.
Dum cook on low for 25 min.

name: Palak Paneer
chefInspiration: Vibrant green curry that's as nutritious as it is delicious.
steps: Blanch spinach and blend.
Sauté onion, add ginger garlic, tomatoes.
Add spinach puree and spices.
Add paneer cubes, finish with cream.

name: Rajma
chefInspiration: Sunday rajma chawal — pure nostalgia in a bowl.
steps: Pressure cook rajma until soft.
Make masala base with onion, tomato, spices.
Add rajma and simmer 15 min.
Garnish with coriander.

name: Butter Chicken
chefInspiration: The dish that won the world over — creamy, smoky, perfectly spiced.
steps: Marinate and grill chicken.
Make sauce with butter, tomatoes, cashew paste.
Add spices and simmer.
Add chicken and cream, finish with fenugreek.
